name: Graceful Ember
author: Asra
description: Inspired by Bad Omens - THE DEATH OF PEACE OF MIND. Elegant neumorphic light theme with radiant red-orange accents over a warm, comforting cream canvas.

1.3.7: Fix: allow album-card box-shadow glow to render above album cards (overflow: visible).
Fix: star rating clipping in the queue (queue-current-info / queue-current-track-body overflow: visible).
Add breathing room for first row of album cards.
Adjust star rating SVG/size for consistent appearance.
